productDisplayName: Doodle Boys Catch Me Red Tshirt
description: Composition Red round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach or iron on print Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed This doodle T-shirt is designed to make your little bundle of mischief look cute while she stays comfortable all day with the cotton fabric. The red hue is a tribute to her girlish sweetness while the print showcases her love for all things whimsical. Pair it with a denim skirt and pink floaters for unbridled comfort.
